global_description: Large mammal with a massive, rounded body, thick gray skin, long trunk, large floppy ears, and tusks. The legs are thick and sturdy, supporting its heavy weight. The tail is relatively short with a tuft of hair at the end.

part_details.head: Large with a long trunk and tusks, big floppy ears
part_details.body: Massive and rounded, covered in thick gray skin
part_details.legs: Thick and sturdy, supporting the heavy body
part_details.trunk: Long and flexible, extending from the head
part_details.ears: Large and floppy, positioned on the sides of the head

spatial_relations: Trunk extends from the front of the head
Tusks protrude from the sides of the trunk
Ears are positioned on the sides of the head
